tree.name: Julian Strawther
tree.tradeDescription: 4-team trade: Denver sent 2029 1st round pick to OKC and Maxwell Lewis (#40) to LAL. Denver received Julian Strawther (#29), Jalen Pickett (#32), and Hunter Tyson from IND/OKC

assetsGivenUp.name: 2029 1st Round Pick via DEN
assetsGivenUp.note: Denver's own 2029 first-round pick (protected), sent to OKC in 4-team draft-night trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Maxwell Lewis
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted 40th overall by Denver on June 22, traded to LAL the next day in 4-team deal
